name: Hockey Stars
author: Poki
description: Hockey Stars is a 1v1 hockey game where you must duke it out as your favourite country to beat your opponent! The aim of the game is pretty simple, score in their goal before they score in yours! Jump around for some extra power and charge forward into towards the enemies goal! Want to challenge your friend to a game? There's local multiplayer so you can play against your friend! Can you become the hockey champion? How to play Hockey Stars ? Movement: WAD or arrow keys Shoot: J, F or L Who created Hockey Stars ? Hockey Stars is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Tag , Stickman Bike and wall-jumper! How can I play Hockey Stars for free? You can play Hockey Stars for free on Poki! Can I play Hockey Stars on mobile devices and desktop? Hockey Stars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Hockey Stars with my friend? Yes! Hockey Stars is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
